description: A highly useful knitted hat with textured horizontal rib pattern. Finished with a solid colour faux fur pompom which is detachable, this gives 2 looks from 1 hat. Wear with or without the pompom. Available in 6 colours. Machine wash at 30 degrees.TOSKATOK is registered to a UK company and you can be assured of a quick delivery.
